hero.description: Skriptor converts your audio into accurate transcriptions in seconds. Perfect for meetings, interviews, lectures, and more.

upload.title: Upload Your Audio

process.description: Our advanced AI analyzes your audio, identifies speakers, and transcribes with high accuracy.

review.title: Review & Export
